headline: Jim Cramer Explains Why Match Group Was Expelled from the S&P 500
summary: Match Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:MTCH) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer discussed amid the reshuffling of the S&P 500. Cramer highlighted the shrinkage of the company’s market cap over the past 5 years, as he commented: So what about the companies that got expelled from the S&P? First, Match Group.
